chosen_action.title: Repair measurement-hold truth reuse so alias-only refreshes do not trigger duplicate hold work

why_this_action.summary: Active review-window logs showed no truthful do-now packet and repeated hold-window churn was a higher-leverage target than regenerating already-current packets.
supporting_reasons: Codeberg remained flat in the latest adoption window, so fake-progress packet refreshes would not improve the primary outcome.
The execution board still showed no truthful do-now packet in the current review window.
Alias or resync-only artifact writes during measurement hold could cause unnecessary follow-through refreshes instead of reusing the existing truthful artifact.

result.summary: Added content-fingerprint verification for measurement-hold truth artifacts, persisted those fingerprints in hold execution logs, and kept empty-board packet lanes collapsed to measurement_hold during active holds.
